seoTitle: Ellendale vs Emita — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ellendale and Emita. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ellendale and Emita.
heading: Ellendale vs Emita — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellendale, Tasmania and Emita, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellendale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Emita (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellendale or Emita safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellendale has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Emita scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellendale scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Emita scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellendale or Emita?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellendale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
